---
name: Security Report
about: Report a security vulnerability
title: '[SECURITY] '
labels: security, critical
assignees: moeshawky
---

## Security Issue Description
A clear description of the security vulnerability.

## Impact
What is the potential impact if exploited?
- Severity: [Critical/High/Medium/Low]
- Attack vector: [e.g., memory safety, input validation, etc.]

## Affected Versions
List all affected versions.

## Proof of Concept
If applicable, provide a minimal example demonstrating the vulnerability.

## Suggested Fix
If you have ideas for how to fix this, please describe them.

## Disclosure Timeline
- [ ] I have not disclosed this issue publicly
- [ ] I have not disclosed this issue to other parties
- [ ] I would like to coordinate disclosure

## Contact Information
How can we reach you for follow-up questions?
